mapper.insert: insert into score(student_id, course_id, score, exam_type, exam_date) values(#{studentId}, #{courseId}, #{score}, #{examType}, #{examDate})
mapper.update: update score set student_id = #{studentId}, course_id = #{courseId}, score = #{score}, exam_type = #{examType}, exam_date = #{examDate} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select s.id, s.student_id as studentId, stu.name as studentName, s.course_id as courseId, c.name as courseName, s.score, s.exam_type as examType, s.exam_date as examDate from score s left join student stu on s.student_id = stu.id left join course c on s.course_id = c.id where s.id = #{id}

select s.id, s.student_id as studentId, stu.name as studentName, s.course_id as courseId, c.name as courseName, s.score, s.exam_type as examType, s.exam_date as examDate from score s left join student stu on s.student_id = stu.id left join course c on s.course_id = c.id
